title: Careers
text:
A career at the MDA is a rare opportunity to lead the greatest technological achievement of our time. If you qualify, you will be part of a team protecting your nation and defending freedom. And you will be building a career that you know makes a difference, helping your nation on exciting technological projects you simply won't find anywhere else. It's your chance to use your special talents to personally contribute to a safer future for America and the entire free world.
Professionally, you will work within a streamlined organizational structure, shoulder-to-shoulder among a unique group of highly motivated and talented scientists, engineers and business professionals developing cutting-edge technology and skills. And your assignment requires you to take programs from the drawing board to deployment in a minimum amount of time.
